title: Dancing Hoppers
description: More hoppers for item transportation, which can carry items from other sides besides the top side.
body:
# Abstract

This mod adds more hoppers for item transportation:

- Inverted hoppers and lateral hoppers, which are able to carry items from other sides besides the top side.
- Accelerated hoppers, which work more frequently than vanilla hoppers.

# Crash with Radium

To prevent crashing with Radium mod installed, disable Lithium's Hopper optimizations by adding the following line to the instance's minecraft/config/lithium.properties file:

```
mixin.block.hopper=false
```

Or you can use Canary instead.
